title: helianthella iostephanoides
intro: Helianthella iostephanoides, also known as Rocky Mountain helianthella or iostephanoid false sunflower, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helianthella iostephanoides include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Helianthella iostephanoides can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
